title: Defined's Blocks
description: A mod that add my favorite blocks
body: # Defined's Blocks This is a fabric mod that adds a bunch of my favourite blocks. ## Contents - Mossy blocks - Future block: Fake AE2 controller block, good for decorating - Mana glasses from Botania ## Credits - [MikoTheBoi](https://github.com/MikoTheBoi) for mossy blocks textures - [Applied-Energistics-2](https://github.com/AppliedEnergistics/Applied-Energistics-2) - [Botania](https://github.com/VazkiiMods/Botania) ## License Released under the [MIT](https://github.com/definedentity/Defineds-Blocks/blob/main/LICENSE) license.
